data.name: Settings.Language.Description
data.value: Controls the language as well as date, time, and number formats.

data.name: Ui.Dashboard.StopAllInstancesOfThisJob
data.value: Stop all instances of this job

data.name: Ui.Automation.Details.TimeWindowsSpanningMidnightAreSupported
data.value: Time windows spanning midnight are supported

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ProcessResultHint
data.value: The result (successful = process is running) can be evaluated in if conditions.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ActiveWindowResultHint
data.value: The result (window active) can be evaluated in if conditions.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ElseDescription
data.value: No configuration required. This block runs when no previous condition matched.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.EndIfDescription
data.value: No configuration required. Ends the previous If/ElseIf/Else block.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.EndJobDescription
data.value: No configuration required. Ends the job immediately; subsequent steps are not executed.

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.ThesePointsAreCheckedAgainstTheCondition
data.value: These points are checked against the condition

data.name: Ui.Step.Settings.UseAllPointsFoundByThisStep
data.value: Use all points found by this step

data.name: Ui.Macro.Steps.ToggleRecordMousePathOrClicksOnly
data.value: Toggle: record mouse path or clicks only

data.name: Dialog.Unsaved.Message
data.value: There are unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?

data.name: Validation.IntervalPositive
data.value: The interval must be greater than 0.

data.name: Validation.ActiveWindowPair
data.value: “Active from” and “Active until” must either both be set or both be empty.

data.name: Automation.Hotkey.CaptureError
data.value: The hotkey could not be captured.

data.name: Automation.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete the automation “{0}”?

data.name: Automation.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you really want to delete the {0} selected automations?

data.name: Job.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete the job “{0}”?

data.name: Job.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you really want to delete the {0} selected jobs?

data.name: Macro.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete the macro “{0}”?

data.name: Macro.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you really want to delete the {0} selected macros?

data.name: Step.Delete.One
data.value: Do you really want to delete this step?

data.name: Step.Delete.Many
data.value: Do you want to delete the {0} selected steps?

data.name: Step.Delete.IfBlock
data.value: Do you want to delete the if block? If, else-if, else, and end-if are removed; the contained steps remain.

data.name: Error.JobStepExecution.Message
Condition.Match.Any
data.value: At least one condition must be met

data.name: Step.Description.DesktopDuplication
data.value: Captures the selected monitor and provides the screenshot as an image source.

data.name: Step.Description.TemplateMatching
data.value: Compares an image template with the image source of a capture step.

data.name: Step.Description.ColorDetection
data.value: Detects a specific color in an image source.

data.name: Step.Description.PredictMovement
data.value: Predicts a target position from previous detection points.

data.name: Step.Description.YoloDetection
data.value: Detects objects with a YOLO model and stores their position.

data.name: Step.Description.KlickOnPoint
data.value: Clicks the most recently detected image point.

data.name: Step.Description.KlickOnPoint3D
data.value: Moves the pointer to a target using an FOV calculation and clicks it.

data.name: Step.Description.ShowImage
data.value: Shows the current image in a preview window.

data.name: Step.Description.ShowOnDesktop
data.value: Draws the detection result as a desktop overlay.

data.name: Step.Description.VideoCreation
data.value: Saves the current image stream as a video file.

data.name: Step.Description.JobExecution
data.value: Starts another job and optionally waits for it to finish.

data.name: Step.Description.ScriptExecution
data.value: Runs an external PowerShell, Python, or batch script.

data.name: Step.Description.Timeout
data.value: Waits for a configured duration before running the next step.

data.name: Step.Description.StartProcess
data.value: Starts a program or executable file.

data.name: Step.Description.FocusProcess
data.value: Brings the main window of a running process to the foreground.

data.name: Step.Description.ShowText
data.value: Shows configurable text on the desktop.

data.name: Step.Description.ActiveProcess
data.value: Checks whether a process is currently running.

data.name: Step.Description.ActiveWindow
data.value: Checks whether a process window is in the foreground.

data.name: Step.Description.PointComparison
data.value: Compares points with a reference point or axis expressions.

data.name: Step.Description.KeyPointMatching
data.value: Compares SIFT keypoints from a template with an image source.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.Hotkey
data.value: Starts the automation when the configured keyboard shortcut is pressed.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.OnceAt
data.value: Runs the automation once at the selected date and time.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.Schedule
data.value: Runs the automation on the selected weekdays at the configured time.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.Interval
data.value: Repeats the automation regularly using the configured time interval.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.ProcessStarted
data.value: Starts the automation when the specified process is opened.

data.name: Automation.Trigger.Description.ProcessExited
data.value: Starts the automation when the specified process exits.
